metadata.description: OpenADLC, the human-in-the-loop development lifecycle for AI coding agents: an open standard with a source-available reference implementation (free for individuals; organizations need a commercial seat). The always-on adlc-core spine (the four /agentic-* commands + the lifecycle checkpoints) plus domain packs.

plugins.name: adlc-ai
plugins.description: AI/LLM engineering domain: integrate LLMs into apps and services (Anthropic SDK-first), prompt engineering, evals, RAG, agent architecture, safety/guardrails, on-device AI; ai-architect + ai-reviewer agents. Serves product AI features and AI tooling.

plugins.name: adlc-android
plugins.description: Android domain: action skills, WebView engineering, 10 on-demand convention rules; android-reviewer + android-architect agents.

plugins.name: adlc-backend
plugins.description: Thin backend domain for solo-scale products: modular-monolith architecture, API design, auth/identity, background jobs, and the game-server bits (leaderboards, authoritative sim re-validation, IAP server notifications). Managed services, no microservices/K8s. Routes deploy/observability to adlc-ops, security hardening to adlc-security, and the data layer (schema, migrations, queries, access) to adlc-database; keeps its own opinionated Postgres/Flyway stack.

plugins.name: adlc-core
plugins.description: ALWAYS-ON spine (deploy globally): the four /agentic-* commands (intake, plan, implement, review) and the lifecycle checkpoints, plus software design (principles, patterns, refactoring, reusability), codebase research, decision records, docs, and commit linking. Outbound steps stop and ask the operator for an explicit yes.

plugins.name: adlc-design
plugins.description: Cross-cutting design domain, loaded only when the work touches Figma or a design surface (Figma is the only supported design tool for now): on-demand Figma skills (design-context extraction, design-token mapping + precise Code Connect mappings to the design system, DS/style/font reuse, live-design drift detection, pixel-fidelity verification), the design-token pipeline (DTCG -> Style Dictionary -> web/iOS/Android), UI craft + anti-generic doctrine, UX flows + usability heuristics, accessibility, and the design-critic agent. Cite from any UI domain pack.

plugins.name: adlc-ios
plugins.description: iOS domain: SwiftUI-first action skills, SPM interface/impl modules, KMP interop, App Store compliance, on-demand convention references; ios-architect + ios-reviewer agents.

plugins.name: adlc-monetization
plugins.description: Monetization & live-ops domain: native IAP (StoreKit/Play Billing) with server receipt validation, F2P economy design, live-ops (battle pass/events/remote config), ads mediation, A/B experimentation, install attribution. Engine-agnostic design; Unity SDK wiring lives in adlc-unity. Routes policy to the compliance packs.

plugins.name: adlc-ops
plugins.description: Operations domain for launched products: crash/error monitoring (Sentry/Crashlytics), product analytics design, observability (uptime/health/SLO), CI/CD pipeline authoring, managed-cloud deploy. Solo-scale (managed services, no K8s). Routes test strategy to adlc-testing, the deploy gate to adlc-quality-gates.

plugins.name: adlc-planning
plugins.description: Deeper planning: revise/resume a plan, define API/module contracts, analyze a ticket's impact; architect, adlc-author, implementation-lead, and story-implementer agents.

plugins.name: adlc-privacy
plugins.description: Privacy & data-protection domain: GDPR/CCPA engineering (consent, DSAR, erasure, retention, ROPA), consent management (ATT/UMP), F2P games compliance (gacha odds disclosure, loot-box law, COPPA/kids, ads-to-minors), data-flow audit, OSS license scanning; privacy-reviewer agent.

plugins.name: adlc-quality-gates
plugins.description: Readiness gates (deployment, plan, traceability) + skill structure/efficacy checks.

plugins.name: adlc-security
plugins.description: Security: OWASP MASVS/MASTG + API Top 10, domain-adaptive SAST + secret scanning, negative testing, pentest mindset, threat taxonomy; security-reviewer; /adlc-security-review.

plugins.name: adlc-testing
plugins.description: Test strategy, scenario expansion, architecture conformance, validation contracts; test-critic agent; /validate-scenario.

plugins.name: adlc-unity
plugins.description: Unity game domain (C#): build/test via the Unity MCP, assembly architecture, deterministic simulation for real-time PvP, mobile performance, UI Toolkit + design tokens, monetization SDK wiring, store builds; unity-architect + unity-reviewer agents. For the F2P mobile games.

plugins.name: adlc-web
plugins.description: Web frontend domain: framework-agnostic typed components (detect-first across React/Vue/Svelte/Angular), state management, forms + validation, the SSR/edge boundary, web performance + bundling, and web testing; web-architect + web-reviewer agents. Pairs with adlc-design (tokens, a11y, Figma).

plugins.name: adlc-database
plugins.description: Data domain: schema design (SQL + NoSQL, detect-first), safe zero-downtime migrations, query + index optimization, and the data-access layer (ORM / query builder / raw, transactions, parameterized queries); database-architect + database-reviewer agents. adlc-backend routes data-layer depth here.

plugins.name: adlc-desktop
plugins.description: Desktop app domain (build Electron / Tauri / native apps, detect-first): the process + IPC model and its security, native OS integration (menus, tray, notifications, file system, auto-update, deep links), and packaging / signing / notarization / distribution; desktop-architect + desktop-reviewer agents. Distinct from the OpenADLC desktop product.

plugins.name: adlc-backend-cloud
plugins.description: Enterprise / team-scale backend tier (the opt-in scale-up from adlc-backend's solo-scale monolith): containers, Kubernetes orchestration, infrastructure-as-code, async messaging + streaming, distributed data at scale, and progressive delivery; backend-cloud-architect + backend-cloud-reviewer agents. Routes observability to adlc-ops, security to adlc-security, data modeling to adlc-database.
